title: lepisorus oosphaerus
intro: Lepisorus oosphaerus, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a species of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lepisorus oosphaerus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
